benchmark.selection_policy: All stable page references in the annotated pilot interval; no pages were removed after inference.

leakage_control.rapidocr: One-shot held-out run after the reference hash and Lecture-3-calibrated preprocessing were frozen.
leakage_control.native_source: The source cleaner was inspected against parser boilerplate and is a calibrated parser baseline, not a strict held-out model result.

rapidocr_errors.interpretation: Most words were recovered, but three columns were interleaved row-wise; AI was also recognized as Al.
Small numbers from the illustrative pixel matrix passed the content filter and dominated edit distance.
An attribution line survived because This was recognized as Ihis.
The semantic figure label Context became Coxt and a source line produced visual noise.
The IMAGENET word embedded in a photo mosaic was not recovered.
The tiny Canny citation was recognized even though attribution is outside the gold content scope.

native_source_errors.interpretation: Native extraction retains a lecture heading, reorders multi-column text, and corrupts bullet glyphs.
Figure labels, the IMAGENET mosaic, and rasterized code are absent from the PDF text layer.
The source page contains later build content that is not yet visible in the selected video frame.

invalid_diagnostic.reason: The first reference bundle used semantic summaries rather than verbatim content, so its CER/WER values are invalid.
invalid_diagnostic.guard: The evaluator now rejects semantic_summary references before scoring.

decision.interpretation: Event-driven local page reading is feasible. Native deck text and OCR are complementary rather than interchangeable.
decision.production_direction: Prefer aligned native text when available, use OCR for deck-free and visual-only content, and retain provenance for both.
decision.next_assignment: Build the shared line-crop, tokenizer, CTC, and split infrastructure before training the handwritten CNN reader.
